message:
Welcome to **The Aquarium**, [user]! You're officially a guild member now.

Here's a quick rundown of our important channels:

> [announcement_channel] - Guild announcements and important updates
> [faq_channel] - Frequently asked questions and guild info
> [guild_bank_channel] - Guild bank information and transactions
> [welcome_channel] - Where new members are welcomed

If you have any questions, don't hesitate to ask around. We're glad to have you!
